testcase.name: getReportNotFoundShouldReturn404
testcase.system-out:
Standard Commons Logging discovery in action with spring-jcl: please remove commons-logging.jar from classpath in order to avoid potential conflicts 18:03:35.789 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.otterworks.report.ReportServiceTest]: ReportServiceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:03:35.851 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.otterworks.report.ReportApplication for test class com.otterworks.report.ReportServiceTest

testcase.name: createExcelReportShouldReturnAccepted
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-23 18:03:39.951 [main] INFO c.o.r.controller.ReportController - Report request: name=User Activity Summary, category=USER_ACTIVITY, type=EXCEL, by=test-user-003 2026-07-23 18:03:39.977 [main] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportService - Created report request: id=1, name=User Activity Summary, type=EXCEL

testcase.name: createReportWithoutNameShouldReturn400
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-23 18:03:40.042 [main] WARN o.s.w.s.m.s.DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver - Resolved [org.springframework.web.bind.MethodArgumentNotValidException: Validation failed for argument [0] in public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<com.otterworks.report.model.ReportResponse> com.otterworks.report.controller.ReportController.createReport(com.otterworks.report.model.ReportRequest): [Field error in object 'reportRequest' on field 'reportName': rejected value [null]; codes [NotBlank.reportRequest.reportName,NotBlank.reportName,NotBlank.java.lang.String,NotBlank]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [reportRequest.reportName,reportName]; arguments []; default message [reportName]]; default message [Report name is required]] ]

testcase.name: createCsvReportShouldReturnAccepted
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-23 18:03:40.053 [main] INFO c.o.r.controller.ReportController - Report request: name=Audit Log Export, category=AUDIT_LOG, type=CSV, by=test-user-002 2026-07-23 18:03:40.055 [main] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportService - Created report request: id=2, name=Audit Log Export, type=CSV

testcase.name: createReportShouldReturnAccepted
testcase.system-out: 2026-07-23 18:03:40.094 [main] INFO c.o.r.controller.ReportController - Report request: name=Test Usage Report, category=USAGE_ANALYTICS, type=PDF, by=test-user-001 2026-07-23 18:03:40.095 [main] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportService - Created report request: id=3, name=Test Usage Report, type=PDF 2026-07-23 18:03:40.095 [task-1] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportDataFetcher - Fetching user activity from: http://auth-service:8081/api/v1/users/activity?from=2026-06-23T18:03:39Z&to=2026-07-23T18:03:39Z 2026-07-23 18:03:40.098 [task-2] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportDataFetcher - Fetching audit data from: http://audit-service:8090/api/v1/audit/events?from=2026-06-23T18:03:40Z&to=2026-07-23T18:03:40Z 2026-07-23 18:03:40.101 [task-3] INFO c.o.report.service.ReportDataFetcher - Fetching analytics data from: http://analytics-service:8088/api/v1/analytics/events?from=2026-06-23T18:03:40Z&to=2026-07-23T18:03:40Z

testcase.name: listReportsShouldReturnEmptyList
